시편 121:1.content: I will lift up my eyes to the hills. Where does my help come from?

시편 121:2.content: My help comes from Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.

시편 121:3.content: He will not allow your foot to be moved. He who keeps you will not slumber.

시편 121:4.content: Behold, he who keeps Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.

시편 121:5.content: Yahweh is your keeper. Yahweh is your shade on your right hand.

시편 121:6.content: The sun will not harm you by day, nor the moon by night.

시편 121:7.content: Yahweh will keep you from all evil. He will keep your soul.

시편 121:8.content: Yahweh will keep your going out and your coming in, from this time forward, and forever more.
